step_rationale: Mitochondrial fission protein activated during cardiomyocyte ischemic injury.
mechanism: Drp1 (DNM1L) drives mitochondrial fission during cardiomyocyte ischemia and necrosis in acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: MARK4 as a novel biomarker of acute myocardial ischemia-induced sudden cardiac death.
